description_long: This is a modern, upright refrigerator with a two-door design, featuring a freezer compartment on top and a larger refrigerator section below. The exterior is finished in a sleek, dark metallic gray, giving it a contemporary and understated appearance suitable for urban environments. The doors are flat and smooth, with a subtle horizontal seam separating the freezer and refrigerator sections. There are no visible external handles, suggesting an integrated or recessed handle design for a minimalist look. The sides and top are plain, with no visible vents, grilles, or control panels. The overall form is boxy and robust, typical of standard household refrigerators.
description: A sleek, dark gray two-door refrigerator with a minimalist, modern design and smooth, flat surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-door configuration with a horizontal seam and smooth, handle-less doors.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the flat, unadorned side panel and the door edges.
description_view_2: Rear or right side view showing a plain, featureless surface with no visible components.
description_view_3: Right side view with a slight angle revealing the door thickness and the separation between the freezer and refrigerator sections.
attribute_door_handle_style: Integrated handles, recessed into the door edges for a minimalist appearance.
